operation: First, a 2D sketch is created on the XY workplane: starting at coordinate (0,0), draw a straight horizontal line to (15,0), add a convex three-point arc passing through (15,5) and terminating at (10,10), draw a straight horizontal line left to (0,10), then close the sketch by connecting back to the start point. This closed profile is extruded 8 units along the positive Z axis to form a solid prism. Next, the topmost Z-facing face of the prism is selected, and a shell operation with 2.0 uniform wall thickness is performed, removing the selected top face to create a hollow open-top structure.
geometry: This is a hollow, open-top thin-walled container with consistent height. Its base and outer profile form a four-sided shape made of three straight edges and one smoothly curved convex edge, with uniform wall thickness across all side walls and the closed flat bottom, and the inner cavity matches the outer contour offset inward by the wall thickness.
function: This is a compact small open storage tray, designed to hold small items such as hardware parts, craft supplies, or electronic components, with a curved edge for convenient access and a solid base for stable placement.
